channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: 4xny/fullstack-auth-starter
item.description: (no description)

item.title: opensouls/opensouls
item.description: The framework for AI souls

item.title: eliasjudin/oai-skills
item.description: The contents of /home/oai/skills in ChatGPT's code interpreter environment

item.title: 4xny/LnKdNt
item.description: (no description)

item.title: assetnote/react2shell-scanner
item.description: High Fidelity Detection Mechanism for RSC/Next.js RCE (CVE-2025-55182 & CVE-2025-66478)

item.title: NVIDIA/cutile-python
item.description: cuTile is a programming model for writing parallel kernels for NVIDIA GPUs

item.title: actionstatelabs/android-action-kernel
item.description: (no description)

item.title: cporter202/scraping-apis-for-devs
item.description: This GitHub repo is a powerhouse collection of scraping APIs for developers that you can start using immediately to build everything from simple automations to full-scale applications.

item.title: zai-org/GLM-TTS
item.description: GLM-TTS: Controllable & Emotion-Expressive Zero-shot TTS with Multi-Reward Reinforcement Learning

item.title: thedotmack/claude-mem
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

item.title: SawyerHood/dev-browser
item.description: A Claude Skill to give your agent the ability to use a web browser

item.title: karpathy/hn-time-capsule
item.description: Analyzing Hacker News discussions from a decade ago in hindsight with LLMs

item.title: FareedKhan-dev/all-agentic-architectures
item.description: Implementation of 17+ agentic architectures designed for practical use across different stages of AI system development.

item.title: basecamp/fizzy
item.description: Kanban as it should be. Not as it has been.

item.title: agentsmd/agents.md
item.description: AGENTS.md — a simple, open format for guiding coding agents

item.title: zai-org/GLM-ASR
item.description: GLM-ASR-Nano: A robust, open-source speech recognition model with 1.5B parameters

item.title: Visionary-Laboratory/visionary
item.description: Visionary: The World Model Carrier Built on WebGPU-Powered Gaussian Splatting Platform

item.title: ali-vilab/Wan-Move
item.description: [NeurIPS 2025] Wan-Move: Motion-controllable Video Generation via Latent Trajectory Guidance

item.title: nkzw-tech/fate
item.description: fate is a modern data client for React.

item.title: donlon/cloudflare-error-page
item.description: Cloudflare error page generator

item.title: mistralai/mistral-vibe
item.description: Minimal CLI coding agent by Mistral

item.title: cporter202/API-mega-list
item.description: This GitHub repo is a powerhouse collection of APIs you can start using immediately to build everything from simple automations to full-scale applications. One of the most valuable API lists on GitHub—period. 💪

item.title: KaijuEngine/kaiju
item.description: General purpose 3D and 2D game engine using Go (golang) and Vulkan with built in editor

item.title: MattParkerDev/SharpIDE
item.description: A modern, cross platform IDE for .NET, built with .NET & Godot

item.title: remix-run/remix-store
item.description: Remix Store - Built on Hydrogen

item.title: Datakitpage/Datakit
item.description: DataKit is a browser-based data analysis platform that processes multi-gigabyte files locally. All processing happens in your browser - no data is sent to external servers.

item.title: HKUDS/Paper2Slides
item.description: "Paper2Slides: From Paper to Presentation in One Click"

item.title: firecrawl/open-scouts
item.description: AI-powered web monitoring platform. Create automated scouts that search the web and send email alerts when they find what you're looking for.

item.title: PaperDebugger/paperdebugger
item.description: Paper Debugger is the best overleaf companion

item.title: tobi/qmd
item.description: mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local

item.title: zai-org/Open-AutoGLM
item.description: (no description)

item.title: illarion/lockenv
item.description: Simple, password-based encrypted vault for .env and infrastructure secrets. Like git-crypt or sops, but dramatically simpler. Ideal for small teams and IaC workflows

item.title: BeehiveInnovations/pal-mcp-server
item.description: The power of Claude Code / GeminiCLI / CodexCLI + [Gemini / OpenAI / OpenRouter / Azure / Grok / Ollama / Custom Model / All Of The Above] working as one.

item.title: alicankiraz1/Ai-Arastirma-Okumalarim-TR
item.description: Ai konusunda yayınlanan makale ve araştırmaların Türkçe detaylı-açıklamalı çevirilerine ve Türkçe Ai'a hazırlattığım Derin Araştırma Dökümanlarıma ulaşabilirsiniz.

item.title: grimthorpe/clbre
item.description: A fork of Calibre called Clbre, because the AI is stripped out.

item.title: markrai/gitpow
item.description: an open-source, cross-platform git client

item.title: sinelaw/fresh
item.description: Text editor for your terminal: easy, powerful and fast

item.title: rs-4/tanstack-ai-demo
item.description: (no description)

item.title: zack0x01/CVE-2025-55182-advanced-scanner-
item.description: (no description)

item.title: tractordev/apptron
item.description: Local-first development platform

item.title: twostraws/SwiftAgents
item.description: An AGENTS.md file for Swift and SwiftUI projects.

item.title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
item.description: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

item.title: Sean-V-Dev/HMLR-Agentic-AI-Memory-System
item.description: Living memory for AI

item.title: AnswerDotAI/clipmd
item.description: Convert clipboard from HTML to MD

item.title: cporter202/automate-for-growth
item.description: Complete guide to automating content for growth: Sora 2 video generation, brand authority automation, multi-platform posting, bulk content creation, and API integration.

item.title: emredavut/CVE-2025-55182
item.description: RSC/Next.js RCE Vulnerability Detector & PoC Chrome Extension – CVE-2025-55182 & CVE-2025-66478

item.title: Miziziziz/Steam-And-Itch-Command-Line-Tools-Guide
item.description: How To Upload To Steam And Itch Using Command Line Tools
